raw: {"perspective": "Communications Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Energy picker does not account for AZ/CIS cultural differences in shame-free language", "recommended_fix": "Modify the energy picker to frame earning mechanics as honor claims, not privacy decisions, and add a 'show [org] what you've earned' feature to satisfy both Western and AZ/CIS shame-free language requirements"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["memory/atlas/relationships.md", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"]}

findings.issue: Energy picker does not account for AZ/CIS cultural differences in shame-free language
findings.recommended_fix: Modify the energy picker to frame earning mechanics as honor claims, not privacy decisions, and add a 'show [org] what you've earned' feature to satisfy both Western and AZ/CIS shame-free language requirements
